final_prompt.prompt:
Create a hyper-realistic jewelry close-up photograph of a sapphire ring with diamond setting (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: must be hyper-realistic
Composition: must be close-up macro detail shot
Subject: must include a sapphire ring with diamond setting as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: must include black velvet background
Lighting/mood: needs a fire-and-brilliance atmosphere with light refracting inside the gemstone — exact light source setup is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: must include sapphire gemstone with internal light refraction and fire, diamond accents, black velvet surface — exact surface treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
